name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BACKLOG-7
title: format-feature-context.py docstring missing precise input schema
description: format-feature-context.py header comment line 8 says input is 'JSON array of {name, path, summary, tdd_state} objects' but doesn't specify which keys are required, whether unknown keys are tolerated, or behavior for missing keys. The implementation will KeyError on missing 'name', 'path', or 'summary' (uses bracket access). Document the contract and behavior explicitly.
